en: After we made contact with the engineers, the Prometheus was destroyed.
All hands were lost, but I escaped with Elizabeth in one of their ships.
I was badly injured on our mission.
I was born in a country where anything was possible.
We celebrated simple freedoms, to live and to love.
When I was 10, my father decided who I should marry.
This is your wife. I have a wife?
But I was in love with the girl next door.
I work all my life, I didn't have any food when I was a kid.
I'm hungry, I don't want to be hungry anymore.
What the hell happened here? It was a fight.
One guy took them all down with his bare hands.
He's still in there.
So, this was your husband? No, I mean, he was just a boyfriend.
It never really went anywhere. You were at work when the victim died?
I was fired today. Wow, you are having a bad day.
Right? I was born and raised in Brooklyn.
My father was a security guard for over 32 years.
Ten years ago in Raccoon City, there was an outbreak.
It spread across the world within days.
One way or another, our world is coming to an end.
How did you get into financial consulting?
How did you get into financial consulting?
My dad was an accountant. You know, he had the whole shtick.
The dorky pocket protector. I have a pocket protector.
That's a nice one. They're still on us.
These guys are taking this person. You were only supposed to create a diversion, Roman.
That was complete destruction. What you want from me?
I'm Roman Pierce, man. It's what I do.
Can you tell me where you were Friday night?
I was in the city, and then I went to visit my husband.
You mean your ex-husband?
It's my understanding that the woman who has gone missing was his nanny.
I want to go to Mars. I wrote those words when I was 12 years old.
Mars is a planet ready for life.
Tell me where you're really from. Mars. I was born here.
Sometimes I feel like I'm from a different planet, too.
Sophia was a beautiful orphan. Chosen by one of the richest men in the city.
Love, honor, and obey.
I was terrified to meet you. You're perfect.
All the time. Thank you.
